_comment: Deployment facts for this project, read by morfdeploy. The four install steps live in one place for the whole parc; this file states only what is specific to this service.
_comment_app_dir: Overridden by MORF_APP_DIR, one variable for every service. The old per-project spellings (MT_/MN_/MS_) are still honoured with a notice.
_comment_configs: Copied at install. Never overwritten by default: these hold settings edited by hand on the machine. An absolute destination is honoured as-is, which is how the shared parc file reaches /etc/morfsystem.
